middleware.description: Reads team_id from the route parameter ({team}), the request body (create-child-resource flows), or the X-Team-Id header. Loads the Team model, checks tenant scoping (refuses when team.tenant_id != request tenant), and stores it on RequestContext::team() so downstream services can call `Request::activeTeam()` without re-fetching. Publishes the `activeTeam` + `activeTeamId` macros on the Request class. Auto-applied on every /api/v1/teams/{team}/** route.

consumed.note: Applied per-route with the required entitlement key: `teams` (all routes), `team_trials` (trial routes), `team_event_participation` (event-team routes).
The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json. Route-level `permission` metadata resolves through this middleware.

ResolveScope narrows queries by the caller's active branch/organization scope. Applied globally to authenticated tenant routes; team routes rely on it for the branch narrowing described in policies.json.
